name: io.github.1llum1n4t1s/cws
description: MCP server for Chrome Web Store — extension upload, publish, status, and rollout

environmentVariables.name: CWS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Service account JSON key (file path or raw JSON). Provide this OR the OAuth trio (CWS_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/REFRESH_TOKEN).

environmentVariables.name: CWS_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth2 Client ID (required when not using a service account)

environmentVariables.name: CWS_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth2 Client Secret (required when not using a service account)

environmentVariables.name: CWS_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 Refresh Token (required when not using a service account)
